types.notes: Represents a unique cache key derived from SearchRequest parameters.
Tracks cache hits, misses, puts, and invalidations.
Thread-safe cache storage using a HashMap wrapped in a Mutex.
Mutex for thread-safe access to shared data.
Context for cache transactions (not fully implemented).

ownership.rationale: Rust's lazy_static provides a thread-safe singleton pattern.
Rust's HashMap uses owned data, ensuring memory safety.
Arc provides thread-safe shared ownership, Mutex ensures exclusivity.

functions.name: CacheManager::get
post: outEntity contains the cached LogicalEntity if found

functions.name: CacheManager::invalidate
post: Cache entry is removed if exists

functions.name: CacheManager::contains
post: Returns true if key exists in cache

functions.name: CacheManager::size
post: Returns the number of cache entries

functions.name: CacheManager::toString
post: Returns a string representation of the cache

functions.name: CacheManager::updateHitMissStats
pre: hit is either true or false
post: Statistics are updated based on hit/miss

invariants: put(key, entity) followed by get(key) returns the same entity.
No key collisions; distinct SearchRequests map to distinct CacheKeys.
Thread-safe; concurrent get/put operations maintain data integrity.
Idempotent puts; putting the same key multiple times is safe.
Cache consistency; get() returns the exact copy of previously stored data.
No capacity limits or time-based expiration (simplified for POC).
No distributed caching or persistence (in-memory only).
All cache operations are atomic and consistent under concurrent access.

concurrency.thread_safety: All cache operations are protected by a Mutex, ensuring thread-safe access.

raw_spec:
types:
  - cpp: "CacheKey"
    rust: "struct CacheKey { /* fields */ }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Represents a unique cache key derived from SearchRequest parameters."
  - cpp: "LogicalEntity"
    rust: "struct LogicalEntity { /* fields */ }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Represents cached data (flights, fares)."
  - cpp: "CacheStatistics"
    rust: "struct CacheStatistics { /* fields */ }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Tracks cache hits, misses, puts, and invalidations."
  - cpp: "std::map<CacheKey, LogicalEntity>"
    rust: "std::sync::Mutex<std::collections::HashMap<CacheKey, LogicalEntity>>"
    ownership: "Arc<Mutex<>>"
    notes: "Thread-safe cache storage using a HashMap wrapped in a Mutex."
  - cpp: "std::mutex"
    rust: "std::sync::Mutex"
    ownership: "Arc<Mutex<>>"
    notes: "Mutex for thread-safe access to shared data."
  - cpp: "CacheTransactionContext"
    rust: "struct CacheTransactionContext { /* fields */ }"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Context for cache transactions (not fully implemented)."

ownership:
  - cpp_pattern: "Singleton instance"
    rust_pattern: "lazy_static::Lazy<CacheManager>"
    rationale: "Rust's lazy_static provides a thread-safe singleton pattern."
  - cpp_pattern: "Raw pointers in std::map"
    rust_pattern: "Owned data in HashMap"
    rationale: "Rust's HashMap uses owned data, ensuring memory safety."
  - cpp_pattern: "Mutex-protected shared state"
    rust_pattern: "Arc<Mutex<>>"
    rationale: "Arc provides thread-safe shared ownership, Mutex ensures exclusivity."

error_paths:
  - source: "CacheManager::get"
    recovery: "Return false on miss"
    rust: "Result<bool, CacheError>"
  - source: "CacheManager::put"
    recovery: "Return false on exception"
    rust: "Result<bool, CacheError>"
  - source: "CacheManager::invalidate"
    recovery: "Return false on non-existent key"
    rust: "Result<bool, CacheError>"
  - source: "CacheManager::toString"
    recovery: "Return empty string on error"
    rust: "Result<String, CacheError>"

functions:
  - name: "CacheManager::get"
    pre: ["key is valid"]
    post: ["outEntity contains the cached LogicalEntity if found"]
    side_effects: ["Updates hit/miss statistics"]
    complexity: "O(log n)"
  - name: "CacheManager::put"
    pre: ["key is valid"]
    post: ["LogicalEntity is stored in cache"]
    side_effects: ["Updates statistics"]
    complexity: "O(log n)"
  - name: "CacheManager::invalidate"
    pre: ["key is valid"]
    post: ["Cache entry is removed if exists"]
    side_effects: ["Updates statistics"]
    complexity: "O(log n)"
  - name: "CacheManager::clear"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["All cache entries are removed"]
    side_effects: ["Updates statistics"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "CacheManager::contains"
    pre: ["key is valid"]
    post: ["Returns true if key exists in cache"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(log n)"
  - name: "CacheManager::size"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns the number of cache entries"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "CacheManager::getStatistics"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns current cache statistics"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "CacheManager::resetStatistics"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Resets all statistics to zero"]
    side_effects: ["Updates statistics"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "CacheManager::toString"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns a string representation of the cache"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "CacheManager::updateHitMissStats"
    pre: ["hit is either true or false"]
    post: ["Statistics are updated based on hit/miss"]
    side_effects: ["Updates statistics"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

invariants:
  - "put(key, entity) followed by get(key) returns the same entity."
  - "No key collisions; distinct SearchRequests map to distinct CacheKeys."
  - "Thread-safe; concurrent get/put operations maintain data integrity."
  - "Idempotent puts; putting the same key multiple times is safe."
  - "Cache consistency; get() returns the exact copy of previously stored data."
  - "No capacity limits or time-based expiration (simplified for POC)."
  - "No distributed caching or persistence (in-memory only)."
  - "All cache operations are atomic and consistent under concurrent access."

concurrency:
  thread_safety: "All cache operations are protected by a Mutex, ensuring thread-safe access."
  shared_state: ["cache_", "stats_"]
